steps.t: Manadhon told you the man called Driftwood might be found somewhere to the east in Halrax.
Driftwood has directed you to bring the money-purses to Manadhon on the upper level of Halrax.
Having satisfied Driftwood's request, you should return to the Wave-hunter.
Driftwood stands by the Wave-hunter in the Shield Isles.
